instructions: Baton is a safety-sensitive Go CLI plus bundled Codex skill for reusable GitHub issue and PR agent workflows. Deterministic policy, git, GitHub, queue, install, branch, and completion logic belongs in the CLI; checkout isolation belongs to the caller; agent judgment belongs in the skill. Reviews should prioritize correctness, explicit error handling, dry-run or pure planning paths for mutations, and preservation of target repository policy as the source of truth. Avoid style comments already covered by automated formatters.

files.description: Repository safety gates, implementation defaults, and validation expectations.
Project overview, current status, and primary command examples.
System shape, module responsibilities, and cross-cutting invariants.
Product and safety requirements for Baton.
Automation isolation boundary and caller-owned checkout lifecycle.
Companion Codex skill responsibilities and boundaries.
Repo-specific review rules for safety boundaries, implementation shape, and test expectations.
